languages.text: "Вам следует знать, что отпрыск Гапраков, который вел армию на подмогу, убит на заставе".

traits.locale_text: "Вам следует знать, что отпрыск Гапраков, который вел армию на подмогу, убит на заставе".

languages.text: "You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."
languages.original_text: "Вам следует знать, что отпрыск Гапраков, который вел армию на подмогу, убит на заставе".

traits.locale_text: "You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."
"You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."
"You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."

languages.text: "Ihr solltet wissen, dass der Gaprak-Spross, der die Verstärkungen anführte, am Außenposten getötet wurde."
languages.original_text: "You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr solltet wissen, dass der Gaprak-Spross, der die Verstärkungen anführte, am Außenposten getötet wurde."

languages.text: “率领援军的贾帕克家族子嗣在前哨被杀害了。”
languages.original_text: "You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."

traits.locale_text: “率领援军的贾帕克家族子嗣在前哨被杀害了。”

languages.text: « Je dois vous informer que l'héritier des Gaprak, qui menait les renforts, a été tué à l'avant-poste. »
languages.original_text: "You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."

traits.locale_text: « Je dois vous informer que l'héritier des Gaprak, qui menait les renforts, a été tué à l'avant-poste. »

languages.text: «Debería saber que el heredero Gaprak, que lideraba el contingente de refuerzo, fue asesinado en el puesto avanzado».
languages.original_text: "You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."

traits.locale_text: «Debería saber que el heredero Gaprak, que lideraba el contingente de refuerzo, fue asesinado en el puesto avanzado».

languages.text: "Takviyeleri yöneten Gaprak vârisinin karakolda öldürüldüğünü bilmelisin."
languages.original_text: "You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."

traits.locale_text: "Takviyeleri yöneten Gaprak vârisinin karakolda öldürüldüğünü bilmelisin."

languages.text: 「補給隊を率いていたガプラク家の跡取りが、前哨基地で戦死した」
languages.original_text: "You should know that the Gaprak scion, who led the army of reinforcements, was killed at the outpost."

traits.locale_text: 「補給隊を率いていたガプラク家の跡取りが、前哨基地で戦死した」
